name: mining
description: /mining — lens-driven DIVERGENCE (add leaves) + CONVERGENCE (add edges) workflow as a slash command. Sibling 3rd pillar to /domain (snapshot · log · MINING). File pair — <NAME>.mining.md (## cycles · ## leaves · ## edges) + <NAME>.mining.tape (idea cart of @X candidates). TWO cycle kinds: **lens cycles** (divergence — apply a lens, add new leaves; depletion = 0 new leaves) and **connect cycles** (convergence — find meaningful direct edges between accumulated leaves, excluding trivial-transitive / re-packaging / generic-ancestor; depletion = 0 new edges in a full pass). Together: mining = (leaves, edges) graph — divergence builds nodes, convergence compresses to underlying truth. Bundled lens catalogue (extensible via `~/.sidecar/lens/<name>.md`): **same-formula** · **ouroboros** (self-reference → goal closure) · **dimensional** · **tension** · **combinatorial** · **custom**. Verbs (10) — bare `/mining` (status) · `/mining <lens>` (divergence round) · `/mining append <text>` · `/mining cycle new <title>` · `/mining depletion` · `/mining tree` (ASCII leaf tree) · `/mining connect` or `/mining edges` (convergence round) · `/mining connect <a> <b>` (justify one edge or record (no-edge)) · `/mining graph` (ASCII (leaves, edges) graph + stats: n · m · n(n-1)/2 · meaningful ratio) · `/mining saturate` (auto-loop connect until 0 new edges, cap 5 inner passes per call). Active-domain scope from /domain pointer (commons @D g58 — off-domain mining forbidden). Cycles append-only. Derived from demiurge RTSC's 13-cycle organic emergence (Cooper-Kramers fixed-point LL-1 + Yoneda equivalence LL-2). NL triggers — '/mining', '/mining <lens>', 'mining cycle', 'lens 발산', 'mining tree', 'mining connect', 'mining edges', 'mining graph', 'mining saturate', '점잇기', '선들 연결', 'edge 발견'.
